docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOGHADAM, MAXIM SIMON
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOGHADAM, MAXIM SIMON
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-02-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MAXIM SIMON MOGHADAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS HUIJING JIANG AND HUIMIN JIANG ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,152.81 FILED BY MOGHADAM, MAXIM SIMON AS TO DEFENDANT JIANG, HUIJING JIANG, HUIMIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $75.00 SERVED MAR-05-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JIANG, HUIMIN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2025 - CONTINUED DUE TO COURT'S CALENDAR CONDITION TO MAY-21-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAWN PAYNE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MAXIM SIMON MOGHADAM IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS HUIJING JIANG AND HUIMIN JIANG ARE NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: COURT'S CALENDAR CONDITION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-21-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MAXIM SIMON MOGHADAM IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT HUIMIN JIANG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOGHADAM, MAXIM SIMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JIANG, HUIJING JIANG, HUIMIN $1,520.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,670.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2025 - JUDGMENT.
